title: Split src/pages/ files over 800-line AMD-027 budget

approach.strategy: Per-page module extraction following src/core/ orchestration tier pattern
discipline: Targeted edits + git diff per module (avoid full-file rewrites)
Each split = its own commit + smoke gate (verify 12/12 dashboard + Tier 2 Playwright)
Manual QA on member-facing surfaces per CLAUDE.md V1+V3 (founder-presence required only when Founder taste is in scope)
risk_management: Branch per page to allow independent rollback
Run AMD-018 11-gate check before any deploy
Caddy Notes update per CLAUDE.md (one honest line per member-visible split)

estimated_effort: 3-5 sessions; home.js + members.js alone are 1-2 sessions each
acceptance_criteria: Tier 2 Playwright E2E passing on chromium + firefox (webkit timing-flakes allowed per B.43)
No regression in Caddy Notes or member-facing flows (Founder QA pass)
deferred_followons: Bundle architecture analysis (Wave 2 — manualChunks splits may need adjustment)
Test coverage uplift to 80% per ECC standard (post-split modules need unit tests)
outcome: All 8 over-budget files split. Each new file under 800-line AMD-027 budget.
